bird.name: Tablas fantail
bird.summary: The Tablas fantail (Rhipidura sauli) is a fantail endemic to the Philippines on Tablas Island. Until recently, it was considered conspecifi…

locations.name: 原始森林
locations.summary: 原始森林又稱原生林，是指一个森林已经达到非常非常长久的年龄而没有遭到显著的干扰，成功表现出独特的生态特征，并可能被归类为顶极群落。原生特性包括多样化的树有关的结构，提供多样化的野生动物栖息地，增加了森林生态系统的生物多样性。多样化的树结构…

relations.subject: Tablas fantail
relations.evidence: The species inhabits tropical moist lowland primary forest in areas with mature closed-canopy forest

relations.subject: Tablas fantail
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Tablas fantail
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, and conversion into farmlands through Slash-and-burn and other methods
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
